title: Aucenix 12PCS Sandpaper, 120 to 2000 Mixed Grits Assorted Sanding Paper Pack for Wood, Fine & Coarse Wet & Dry Waterproof Abrasive Paper Sheets for Walls, Metal Plastic, Furniture Finishing, Polishing
features: 【12 Sheets Sandpaper】 (120/180/220/240/320/400/600/800/1000/1200/1500/2000) Various grit sand paper can be chosen for you. Sanding paper from coarse to fine grit will meet all your sanding needs. Each sandpaper is marked with its own color coded to help you easily identify them.

【Premium & Efficient】 Sand paper adopts high-grade waterproof aluminum oxide mineral and advanced electroplating technology, which makes sandpaper for wood abrasive is evenly distributed and has good feeling of touch. Sand paper pack for wood has excellent tear resistance and flexibility. Sanding effect is good, and grits won't fall off when grinding, which greatly improves service life of sandpaper sheets.

【Wide Uses】 Various thicknesses assorted sandpaper are suitable for handmade, wood, metal, plaster and more for polishing, sanding rough surfaces and removing scratches on surface or repairing objects. Versatile uses are designed for craftsmen and DIY lovers.
【Wet & Dry Use】 Grit surface of sanding paper for walls is fine and evenly, so it can be used not only for cars, plastic and more, but also can be used with water, oil and varnish.
【Can Be Cut To Any Size】 You can decide size and shape of sand papers according to your needs, so that it is more convenient to use on small items.
